_meta.description: Dext setup sections and routing rules for ACT bookkeeping cleanup and future ACT Pty flow.
_meta.principle: Dext captures evidence; Xero remains the accounting system of record; Supabase/workbench is the review layer.

notes: Do not bulk publish historical items until they are classified against Xero bank lines.
Do not publish zero-total, refund-only, duplicate, unknown supplier, or already-reconciled documents.
For NAB Visa ACT #8815 spend, prefer paid spend-money/bank-account destination, not unpaid bills.

new_act_pty_mode.sample_requirement: At least three clean same-vendor same-destination publishes with no phantom bills.
notes: Start new ACT Pty Dext account/client with auto-publish off.
Only enable auto-publish for predictable SaaS/card charges after Xero sync proves the mapping is clean.
Keep travel, contractors, materials, assets, and foreign currency on manual review.

values.name: NAB Visa ACT #8815
values.use_for: ACT card spend already paid by business card

values.name: Personal paid - Ben
values.use_for: Ben paid personally and needs reimbursement/expense claim review

values.name: Personal paid - Nic
values.use_for: Nic paid personally and needs reimbursement/expense claim review

values.name: Bank transfer / invoice
values.use_for: Supplier invoices that are not card-paid
values.xero_destination: Purchases / Bills only if genuinely unpaid or bill workflow is intended

values.name: ACT Infrastructure
values.use_for: core software, internet, AI tools, systems, general infrastructure

values.name: The Harvest Witta
values.use_for: Harvest site, Witta/Maleny property improvements, farm build materials

values.name: The Farm
values.use_for: farm operations, animal welfare, local farm supplies and fuel where not Harvest capital works

values.name: Goods
values.use_for: Goods build, manufacturing, containers, marketplace, product/asset work

values.name: JusticeHub
values.use_for: justice travel, research, civic/youth justice work

values.name: ACT Regenerative Studio
values.use_for: studio operations, accounting, admin, general ACT work that is not infrastructure SaaS

values.name: Empathy Ledger
values.use_for: storytelling, media capture, empathy ledger platform and content work

values.name: PICC On Country Photo Studio
values.use_for: photo studio, camera/print/creative equipment for PICC work

values.name: Mounty Yarns
values.use_for: Mounty Yarns related materials, events, travel, production

values.name: Ask Ben/Nic
values.use_for: travel, meals, hotels, large purchases, ambiguous locations, shared trips

values.name: Standard Ledger Review
values.use_for: BAS/tax treatment, insurance, donations, write-offs, duplicate bills, capitalisation

values.name: Legacy ACT/Nic Dext cleanup
values.use_for: current export and historical Dext cleanup only

values.name: Personal/Reimbursement
values.use_for: items paid personally or not clearly company card spend

category_defaults.tax_rate: GST on Expenses unless overseas/zero-GST invoice
category_defaults.notes: Good auto-publish candidates after test publishes: OpenAI, Anthropic/Claude, Supabase, Webflow, Vercel, Bitwarden, Railway, HighLevel, Dext, Notion.

category_defaults.tax_rate: GST on Expenses if Australian supplier
category_defaults.notes: Belong/Starlink may be ACT-IN, ACT-HV, ACT-FM, or A Curious Tractor depending site/use.
Usually ACT-HV, ACT-FM, ACT-GD, ACT-PS, or ACT-MY based on supplier/location/job.
Likely asset/capital treatment. Do not auto-publish without Standard Ledger review for high-value items.
Kennards/hire usually project-specific and must match job/trip.
Never auto-publish; project, GST, and payable/payment state need review.

category_defaults.tax_rate: GST on Expenses when domestic taxable
No GST / BAS excluded as advised
category_defaults.notes: Foreign currency and overseas travel need project/business-purpose review.

category_defaults.tax_rate: GST on Expenses if Australian taxable receipt
category_defaults.notes: Keep receipt evidence even under threshold; classify by trip/event/business purpose.
Project depends on vehicle/trip/location; Maleny/Witta often ACT-HV or ACT-FM.

category_defaults.tax_rate: No GST / BAS excluded as advised
category_defaults.notes: Likely Harvest/property costs; confirm property and entity.
Insurance often has mixed GST/stamp duty treatment.

supplier_defaults.publish_destination: Bank Accounts / Spend Money only after matching bank line

supplier_defaults.payment_method: NAB Visa ACT #8815 or supplier invoice

supplier_defaults.category: Project Materials / Printing & Stationery / Plant & Equipment

supplier_defaults.publish_destination: Purchases/Bills only if genuinely unpaid; otherwise match paid bank line

never_auto_publish: duplicate image or duplicate Dext receipt ID
insurance or rates needing GST split
